projects.title: WooCommerce Minimum & Maximum Purchase Limit
projects.description:
WooCommerce Minimum & Maximum Purchase Limit plugin gives you the ability to set up minimum and maximum purchase limit for your customers. If the customer cross the purchase limit or try to buy below minimum purchase limit , the plugin will show a custom warning message to your customers as well as you can also disable add to cart and checkout button if your customers try to buy outside of the limit you set .

WooCommerce Minimum & Maximum Purchase Limit plugin also gives you the ability to set up Purchase Restriction date so that you can keep the limit for a certain period . There is also option to setup limit for life time. You can also put purchase limit base on user role.

company.name: MEDIA & BROADCAST TECHNOLOGIES® (MBT)
company.overview:
Founded in 2004, Media Broadcast Technologies® (MBT) is a French independent company specialised in the conception, the development and the integration of software solutions for the audiovisual and broadcast industry. MBT, by the means of their products, is involved in all stages of planning and implementation of digital and broadcast strategies. 
MBT’s product range makes it possible to address all market players: premium, local and thematic channels, the corporate market and other institutional players. 
Based on the latest technologies, MBT's solutions are modular and allow an optimal integration in evolving operational processes. 
Relying on a multidisciplinary team that devotes all its know-how to assist their customers, MBT is now recognised both for its solutions as for its services. 



Media &Broadcast Technologies® (MBT), entreprise innovante en mouvement. 

Créée en 2004, Media Broadcast Technologies® (MBT) est un acteur majeur spécialisé dans la conception, le développement et l’intégration de solutions destinées aux industries de l’audiovisuel et des médias. 
Elle participe à toutes les étapes de la planification et de la mise en oeuvre des stratégies digitales et broadcast. 
L’offre de MBT permet d’adresser tous les acteurs du marché : chaînes premium généralistes, locales et thématiques, le secteur du corporate et autres acteurs institutionnels. 
Basées sur les dernières technologies, les solutions MBT sont modulaires et permettent une intégration optimale dans des processus d’exploitation évolutifs. 
Forte d’une équipe pluridisciplinaire qui consacre tout son savoir-faire à l’accompagnement des clients, MBT est aujourd’hui reconnu tant sur ses solutions que sur ses services proposés.

company.name: GOST Group
company.overview:
Группа компаний GOST («GOST GROUP») является стремительно растущим поставщиком экспертных услуг и решений сфере информационных технологий: от аналитики и консалтинга до разработки бизнес-приложений и комплексной автоматизации бизнеса.
Наша миссия — помогать нашим клиентам в гармоничном выстраивании бизнес-процессов, использовании инновационных технологий для достижения максимальной эффективности бизнеса, развития потенциала своих сотрудников и партнеров.
Наши решения — это инновационные, многофункциональные приложения для государственных организаций, энергетики, ТЭК, предприятий производства, торговли, системы здравоохранения, ЖКХ, и других отраслей.
Наша компания — это сплоченная команда профессионалов с многолетним опытом выполнения проектов в области бизнес-консультирования, инновационных технологий в крупнейших российских и международных компаниях.
Мы применяем индивидуальный и гибкий подход во взаимоотношениях с клиентами, что позволяет эффективно и качественно решать задачи любого уровня сложности.

company.name: Power Finance Corporation Ltd.
company.overview:
Power Finance Corporation Ltd. (PFC) is an Infrastructure Finance Company dedicated to financing the power sector. It was established by the Govt. of India in in July 1986 to provide exclusive focus for financing and development of the power sector in the country. Today, PFC is the single largest lender to the Indian power sector and supports about 23% of the country's installed power generation capacity. 
PFC, in its role as a Development Financial Institution has also been supporting State Power Utilities through a variety of capacity building measures. PFC is also the nodal agency for development of Ultra Mega Power Projects (UMPP) and Restructured Accelerated Power Development and Reforms Program (R-APDRP).

company.name: Revalsys Technologies
company.overview:
At Revalsys Technologies, we don't just create solutions, we craft stories of transformation. Imagine a world where every single change, reform, idea, or thought has the power to connect businesses with their consumers, whether internal or external. We don't just imagine it, we make it a reality.

Our mission is simple yet profound: to provide a unique, unified platform that blends Technology, Marketing, and Social Interaction, customized to address the individual opportunities and challenges faced by our clients. We believe in the magic of connectivity, and we've woven it into the very fabric of our services.

We've left our mark in every business sector, propelling business performance and reshaping the way business is conducted. Our footprint extends far and wide, with more than 10 million users directly or indirectly benefiting from the transformative technology we've designed.

At the heart of Revalsys lies a core ideology: to democratize Technology for everyone and deliver Real Value. We believe that technology should be accessible to all, not just a privilege for a select few. Through our innovative solutions, we aim to empower individuals and organizations to reach new heights and achieve their goals.

Join us on this journey of endless possibilities, where every idea becomes a stepping stone to success, and every challenge is an opportunity waiting to be seized. At Revalsys Technologies, we don't just create possibilities, we create realities. Together, let's write the story of your success.

company.name: SICK Sensor Intelligence
company.overview:
From factory automation to logistics automation – sensor solutions from SICK are keeping industry moving. As a technology and market leader, SICK provides sensor intelligence and application solutions that create the perfect basis for controlling processes securely and efficiently, protecting individuals from accidents, and preventing damage to the environment.

SICK is one of the world’s leading solutions providers for sensor-based applications in the industrial sector. Founded in 1946 by Dr.-Ing. e. h. Erwin Sick, the company with headquarters in Waldkirch im Breisgau near Freiburg ranks among the technological market leaders. With 63 subsidiaries and equity investments as well as numerous agencies, SICK maintains a presence around the globe. SICK has more than 10,000 employees worldwide and generated a group revenue of EUR 2.1 billion in the 2024 fiscal year. Additional information about SICK is available at www.sick.com 

Imprint: https://www.sick.com/imprint

company.name: EPAM Systems
company.overview:
EPAM (NYSE:EPAM) is a global leader in AI transformation engineering and integrated consulting, serving Forbes Global 2000 companies and ambitious startups. With over thirty years of expertise in custom software, product and platform engineering, EPAM empowers organizations to become AI-native enterprises, driving measurable value from innovation and digital investments. Recognized by industry benchmarks and leading analysts as a leader in AI, EPAM delivers globally while engaging locally, making the future real for clients, partners and employees.
 
We are proud to be recognized by Forbes, Glassdoor, Newsweek, Time Magazine, Great Place to Work and kununu as a Most Loved Workplace around the world.
 
Learn more at www.epam.com and follow us on LinkedIn.

company.overview:
HiQ is a tech consulting company focused on custom software development, positioned at the intersection of digital transformation and specialized engineering. Our 1,700 tech experts and software developers blend innovation, creativity, and deep technical know-how to build outstanding digital solutions.
At HiQ, we don't just consult – we engineer digital transformation to ignite the future and help our clients spearhead their industry. Since 2020, we've been part of the Triton family. Our home base is in Sweden, Finland, and Germany, but our digital footprints? They're moonwalking across the globe!

company.name: DISH Network Technologies
company.overview:
DISH Network Technologies India Pvt. Ltd is a subsidiary of EchoStar Corporation (NASDAQ: SATS) that’s been at the forefront of technology. Since 1980, the organisation has served as a disruptive force, driving innovation and value on behalf of consumers. Our products include Boost Mobile (consumer wireless), DISH TV (Direct Broadcast Satellite), Sling TV (OTT), OnTech (Smart Home Services), Hughes (global satellite connectivity solutions) and Hughesnet (satellite internet). 

Established to drive technological convergence in multimedia network and communications development, our centers in India are located at Bengaluru and Hyderabad, playing a crucial role in fostering innovation. As a consumer-centric organization, we've excelled in delivering state-of-the art multimedia communication solutions.

EchoStar has thousands of team members, who are committed to delivering our vision to change the way the world communicates. As one of EchoStar’s largest development facilities outside the U.S., we are a growing team of hundreds of professionals in India with the best engineering talent. With multidisciplinary expertise of our engineers, we have filed for over 200 patents from the market.

company.name: Tata Group
company.overview:
Founded by Jamsetji Tata in 1868, the Tata group is a global enterprise headquartered in India. The group operates in more than 100 countries across six continents with a mission 'To improve the quality of life of the communities we serve globally, through long-term stakeholder value creation based on Leadership with Trust'​.

Sixty-six per cent of the equity of Tata Sons, the promoter holding company, is held by philanthropic trusts, thereby returning wealth to society. The Tata name has been respected in India for 150 years for its adherence to strong values and business ethics.

The companies of the Tata group employ the best and finest, strengthened by a culture of ethics and integrity. Today we stand strong at 702,454 employees.
